TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_hunting1_Muu
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.TRANSL: 我是那瑪夏的人.
I live in Namasia.

S.FORM: sua iku ngʉco pinipining 'ʉnai ia Ka'angiana Ka'angiana Mu'u iku.
S.PHON: sua iku ŋɨʦo pinipiniŋ ʔɨnai ia kaʔaŋiana kaʔaŋiana muʔu iku.
S.FORM: sua iku ngʉco pinipining 'ʉnai ia Ka'angiana Ka'angiana Mu'u iku.
S.PHON: sua iku ŋɨʦo pinipiniŋ ʔɨnai ia kaʔaŋiana kaʔaŋiana muʔu iku.
S.TRANSL: 我在家族的地裡,我叫Ka'angiana Mu'u.
In my family, my name is Ka'angiana Mu'u.

S.FORM: makasuacu niarapipiningku nesi niarapipiningku nesi makasa xx.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu niar~ɾapipiniŋku nesi niar~ɾapipiniŋku nesi makasa **.
S.FORM: makasuacu niarapipiningku nesi niarapipiningku nesi makasa xx.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu niar~ɾapipiniŋku nesi niar~ɾapipiniŋku nesi makasa **.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣我是在這裡出生的.
That's it. I was born here.
後來長大了,我有去上學.
Later, I grew up. I went to school.
那時候剛剛開始寫字.
At that time, I just started to learn writing.
一年級.
First grade.
那時候,我回家.
At that time, I went home.
我媽媽在那邊坐下
My mother sat there.
我馬上把衣服拿起來又藏起來
I immediately took those clothes up and hide them.

S.FORM: aratakarʉku cinamaku nakʉvʉ uvungngungku na mumuin.
S.PHON: ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨku ʦinamaku nakɨvɨ uvuŋŋuŋku na mumuin.
S.FORM: aratakarʉku cinamaku nakʉvʉ uvungngungku na mumuin.
S.PHON: ar~ɾatakar~ɾɨku ʦinamaku nakɨvɨ uvuŋŋuŋku na mumuin.
S.TRANSL: 我就把衣服捆在媽媽的胸部.
I tucked thoes clothes into my mother's breast.
就這樣.
That's all

S.FORM: cʉmʉvʉrʉcuku aratatiacuku maripapa nacumamaku moha na nʉmʉra.
S.PHON: ʦɨmɨvɨr~ɾɨʦuku ar~ɾatatiaʦuku mar~ɾipapa naʦumamaku moha na nɨmɨr~ɾa.
S.FORM: cʉmʉvʉrʉcuku aratatiacuku maripapa nacumamaku moha na nʉmʉra.
S.PHON: ʦɨmɨvɨr~ɾɨʦuku ar~ɾatatiaʦuku mar~ɾipapa naʦumamaku moha na nɨmɨr~ɾa.
S.TRANSL: 我已經增長了,長大了,我過去的爸爸帶著我到山上.
I had grown up, my father who has passed away took me into the mountains.
那個時候我爸爸一直帶我去山上.
At that time, my father always took me to the mountains.

S.FORM: misen nacumamaku 'tupura nesi cʉmʉ'ʉra ngʉco ta sikamanʉngmaku ringee.
S.PHON: misen naʦumamaku ʔtupur~ɾa nesi ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa ŋɨʦo ta sikamanɨŋmaku r~ɾiŋee.
S.FORM: misen nacumamaku 'tupura nesi cʉmʉ'ʉra ngʉco ta sikamanʉngmaku ringee.
S.PHON: misen naʦumamaku ʔtupur~ɾa nesi ʦɨmɨʔɨr~ɾa ŋɨʦo ta sikamanɨŋmaku r~ɾiŋee.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸叫我在這邊坐下,說:「注意看我怎麼做大野獸的陷阱.」
My father said 'Sit here. See how I make the traps for big animals.

S.FORM: mon nia topuru kamanʉng cumaku ringee.
S.PHON: mon nia topur~ɾu kamanɨŋ ʦumaku r~ɾiŋee.
S.FORM: mon nia topuru kamanʉng cumaku ringee.
S.PHON: mon nia topur~ɾu kamanɨŋ ʦumaku r~ɾiŋee.
S.TRANSL: 我一直在那邊坐很久,我爸爸一直在做陷阱.
I sat there for a while. My father kept making traps.

S.FORM: sintun pue'ikim 'inia 'ia'a 'inia ta'urong kai kai kai misen ta'urong.
S.PHON: sintun pueʔikim ʔinia ʔiaʔa ʔinia taʔur~ɾoŋ kai kai kai misen taʔur~ɾoŋ.
S.FORM: sintun pue'ikim 'inia 'ia'a 'inia ta'urong kai kai kai misen ta'urong.
S.PHON: sintun pueʔikim ʔinia ʔiaʔa ʔinia taʔur~ɾoŋ kai kai kai misen taʔur~ɾoŋ.
S.TRANSL: 在那邊住三天,我們回到那邊. 哎呀! 一隻山羌.「嘎、嘎、嘎」山羌這樣叫.
We stayed there for three days. As we came back to there, 'Wow! One muntjac.' The muntjac bleated.

S.FORM: makasuacu macangcangarʉ cʉpʉngmaku 'ah unava ngʉco nimuringee.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ ʦɨpɨŋmaku ʔah unava ŋɨʦo nimur~ɾiŋee.
S.FORM: makasuacu macangcangarʉ cʉpʉngmaku 'ah unava ngʉco nimuringee.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ ʦɨpɨŋmaku ʔah unava ŋɨʦo nimur~ɾiŋee.

TRANSL.notes: 就這樣,我心裡很高興還有套到的(山羌).

S.TRANSL: 就這樣,我心裡很高興還有套到的 .
Then I was happy for catching a muntjac.
爸爸一直打他的頭,直到打死.
Dad was kept attacking its head until it died.
就這樣,我們就回家.
Then, we went home.

S.FORM: sua ikim miana Kanakanavu ia nuu niaracakanci ia pue'ici tanasa ia arasusurʉn kangvang ngʉco pinipining ivatacu kumakʉn kumakʉn nguai nivatucu kangvang pinipining kangvang mamanu mau'ura kumakʉn ngʉcoo aramu nipuringe nacumamaku.
S.PHON: sua ikim miana kanakanavu ia nuu niar~ɾaʦakanʦi ia pueʔiʦi tanasa ia ar~ɾasusur~ɾɨn kaŋvaŋ ŋɨʦo pinipiniŋ ivataʦu kumakɨn kumakɨn ŋuai nivatuʦu kaŋvaŋ pinipiniŋ kaŋvaŋ mamanu mauʔur~ɾa kumakɨn ŋɨʦoo ar~ɾamu nipur~ɾiŋe naʦumamaku.
S.FORM: sua ikim miana Kanakanavu ia nuu niaracakanci ia pue'ici tanasa ia arasusurʉn kangvang ngʉco pinipining ivatacu kumakʉn kumakʉn nguai nivatucu kangvang pinipining kangvang mamanu mau'ura kumakʉn ngʉcoo aramu nipuringe nacumamaku.
S.PHON: sua ikim miana kanakanavu ia nuu niar~ɾaʦakanʦi ia pueʔiʦi tanasa ia ar~ɾasusur~ɾɨn kaŋvaŋ ŋɨʦo pinipiniŋ ivataʦu kumakɨn kumakɨn ŋuai nivatuʦu kaŋvaŋ pinipiniŋ kaŋvaŋ mamanu mauʔur~ɾa kumakɨn ŋɨʦoo ar~ɾamu nipur~ɾiŋe naʦumamaku.
S.TRANSL: 以前我們Kanakanavu人,當打獵完回家的時候,我們叫每一個家都來吃一吃我過去的爸爸套到的.
In the past, after we Kanakanavu people finished hunting, we went home calling our neighbors to come to eat the meat my father had caught.
我比較懂了.
Then, I more understood the things.
我懂了.
I understood.
當我比較懂事了,我的爸爸就比較老一點.
At that time, as I know things more, my father became aged.

S.FORM: mehua ia maracicinku mohan nʉmʉra rumaringe maracicin mosa nʉmʉra rumaringe.
S.PHON: mehua ia mar~ɾaʦiʦinku mohan nɨmɨr~ɾa r~ɾumar~ɾiŋe mar~ɾaʦiʦin mosa nɨmɨr~ɾa r~ɾumar~ɾiŋe.
S.FORM: mehua ia maracicinku mohan nʉmʉra rumaringe maracicin mosa nʉmʉra rumaringe.
S.PHON: mehua ia mar~ɾaʦiʦinku mohan nɨmɨr~ɾa r~ɾumar~ɾiŋe mar~ɾaʦiʦin mosa nɨmɨr~ɾa r~ɾumar~ɾiŋe.
S.TRANSL: 那時候就自己去山上做套.
I went mountains making traps by myself.

S.PHON: sinsipatɨn pueʔiku ʔinia ʔe ʔinia takuisi nimur~ɾiŋe.
sinsipatɨn pueʔiku ʔinia ʔe ʔinia takuisi nimur~ɾiŋe.
S.TRANSL: 過了十天以後,我回去那,在那邊我套到山羊.
After ten days, I went back there. I caught a goat there!

S.FORM: a a a misee ngʉcoo takuisi makasuacu vura'ekua navungin.
S.PHON: a a a misee ŋɨʦoo takuisi makasuaʦu vur~ɾaʔekua navuŋin.
S.FORM: a a a misee ngʉcoo takuisi makasuacu vura'ekua navungin.
S.PHON: a a a misee ŋɨʦoo takuisi makasuaʦu vur~ɾaʔekua navuŋin.
S.TRANSL: 然後我打他的頭.
Then I hit its head.
我打他的頭.
I hit its head.
我背不動.
I could not carry it.

S.FORM: nakai temaku temaku patiuruun putukava mamanʉng ngʉco ha'unun na takicu.
S.PHON: nakai temaku temaku patiur~ɾuun putukava mamanɨŋ ŋɨʦo haʔunun na takiʦu.
S.FORM: nakai temaku temaku patiuruun putukava mamanʉng ngʉco ha'unun na takicu.
S.PHON: nakai temaku temaku patiur~ɾuun putukava mamanɨŋ ŋɨʦo haʔunun na takiʦu.
S.TRANSL: 那時候我知道我要先剝皮, 這樣的話比較好用背網背.
However, I knew that I had to askave the hide of the boar first, so that I could carry it with the mesh bag easily.

S.FORM: makasuacu pue'cuku tanasa macangcangarʉ nacinamaku nacumamaku nipue'icu makasuacu takuisi.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu pueʔʦuku tanasa maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ naʦinamaku naʦumamaku nipueʔiʦu makasuaʦu takuisi.
S.FORM: makasuacu pue'cuku tanasa macangcangarʉ nacinamaku nacumamaku nipue'icu makasuacu takuisi.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu pueʔʦuku tanasa maʦaŋʦaŋar~ɾɨ naʦinamaku naʦumamaku nipueʔiʦu makasuaʦu takuisi.
S.TRANSL: 打到一個山羊,把皮先拿掉,就這樣回家了,他的爸媽看到他說,你打到了他們很高興.
I caught a goat. I took off its hide firstly. Then I went home. 'You caught a goat!' my parents said to me happily.

S.FORM: makasuacu nimosaku na na ngʉcoo hetai.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu nimosaku na na ŋɨʦoo hetai.
S.FORM: makasuacu nimosaku na na ngʉcoo hetai.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu nimosaku na na ŋɨʦoo hetai.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣我就去部隊.
Then I entered the army.

S.FORM: mosaku na hetai pue'icu mintasʉcuku makasua ngʉcoo tina'anmaku.
S.PHON: mosaku na hetai pueʔiʦu mintasɨʦuku makasua ŋɨʦoo tinaʔanmaku.
S.FORM: mosaku na hetai pue'icu mintasʉcuku makasua ngʉcoo tina'anmaku.
S.PHON: mosaku na hetai pueʔiʦu mintasɨʦuku makasua ŋɨʦoo tinaʔanmaku.

TRANSL.notes: 我的身體就那樣(有力氣).

S.TRANSL: 我的身體就那樣 .
Then I became strong.

S.FORM: makasuacuku na ngʉnco cakʉran Namasia ihi na ngʉnco ikita Kanakanavu ia pakasin toliu.
S.PHON: makasuaʦuku na ŋɨnʦo ʦakɨr~ɾan namasia ihi na ŋɨnʦo ikita kanakanavu ia pakasin to*iu.
S.FORM: makasuacuku na ngʉnco cakʉran Namasia ihi na ngʉnco ikita Kanakanavu ia pakasin toliu.
S.PHON: makasuaʦuku na ŋɨnʦo ʦakɨr~ɾan namasia ihi na ŋɨnʦo ikita kanakanavu ia pakasin to*iu.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,我們在楠梓仙溪這邊,我們卡那卡那富,就被叫做六溪.
Just like this, we Kanakanavu are called liuxi because of the river.

S.PHON: moku ʔinia r~ɾumar~ɾiŋee pusur~ɾiŋee ikua vutun.
moku ʔinia r~ɾumar~ɾiŋee pusur~ɾiŋee ikua vutun.
S.TRANSL: 我就套了山鹿.
Then I caught a deer.

S.FORM: wow siree vutun tatia! mʉkʉn makai cacane ikua vutun!
S.PHON: wow sir~ɾee vutun tatia! mɨkɨn makai ʦaʦane ikua vutun!
S.FORM: wow siree vutun tatia! mʉkʉn makai cacane ikua vutun!
S.PHON: wow sir~ɾee vutun tatia! mɨkɨn makai ʦaʦane ikua vutun!
S.TRANSL: 哇塞!山鹿很大!
Oops! The deer was quite big!

S.FORM: ka'anku tavara'ʉ ngʉnco pusaan 'inia pepacare kua.
S.PHON: kaʔanku tavar~ɾaʔɨ ŋɨnʦo pusaan ʔinia pepaʦar~ɾe kua.
S.FORM: ka'anku tavara'ʉ ngʉnco pusaan 'inia pepacare kua.
S.PHON: kaʔanku tavar~ɾaʔɨ ŋɨnʦo pusaan ʔinia pepaʦar~ɾe kua.
S.TRANSL: 不知道要怎麼樣搬,就用殺的.
I did not know how to move it, so I killed it.
我就回家去跟人說.
Then I went home and told people that.

S.FORM: sua cau ihua ia nivuamaku kimparaa nivuamaku kimparaa si 'anku pua'an ku 'anku tavara'ʉ ngʉnco ma'un vutun.
S.PHON: sua ʦau ihua ia nivuamaku kimpar~ɾaa nivuamaku kimpar~ɾaa si ʔanku puaʔan ku ʔanku tavar~ɾaʔɨ ŋɨnʦo maʔun vutun.
S.FORM: sua cau ihua ia nivuamaku kimparaa nivuamaku kimparaa si 'anku pua'an ku 'anku tavara'ʉ ngʉnco ma'un vutun.
S.PHON: sua ʦau ihua ia nivuamaku kimpar~ɾaa nivuamaku kimpar~ɾaa si ʔanku puaʔan ku ʔanku tavar~ɾaʔɨ ŋɨnʦo maʔun vutun.
S.TRANSL: 那個人我給他零錢,因為我背不動山鹿.
I gave money to that person because I could not carry it.
就這樣,我們回家.
Then we went home.

S.FORM: mehua ia una pa ngʉnco pu'a ngʉnco aram mehua ia mamanʉngpa ngʉnco mehua kimparaa mara tatiapa.
S.PHON: mehua ia una pa ŋɨnʦo puʔa ŋɨnʦo ar~ɾam mehua ia mamanɨŋpa ŋɨnʦo mehua kimpar~ɾaa mar~ɾa tatiapa.
S.FORM: mehua ia una pa ngʉnco pu'a ngʉnco aram mehua ia mamanʉngpa ngʉnco mehua kimparaa mara tatiapa.
S.PHON: mehua ia una pa ŋɨnʦo puʔa ŋɨnʦo ar~ɾam mehua ia mamanɨŋpa ŋɨnʦo mehua kimpar~ɾaa mar~ɾa tatiapa.
S.TRANSL: 那個時候還好錢還比較大.
It was good that money was big.

S.FORM: makasuacu sinsʉpatʉn pue'iku nia sʉmasʉrʉcʉ poringee iikua mangʉrisi.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu sinsɨpatɨn pueʔiku nia sɨmasɨr~ɾɨʦɨ por~ɾiŋee iikua maŋɨr~ɾisi.
S.FORM: makasuacu sinsʉpatʉn pue'iku nia sʉmasʉrʉcʉ poringee iikua mangʉrisi.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu sinsɨpatɨn pueʔiku nia sɨmasɨr~ɾɨʦɨ por~ɾiŋee iikua maŋɨr~ɾisi.
S.TRANSL: 然後四天後,我套到公山豬.
After four days, I went back there to see the traps. I caught a male boar.
我套到一隻公山豬.牠非常嚇人.
I caught a male boar. It looks frightening!
我為什麼會怕?
Why I felt afraid?

S.FORM: vavuru ia noo nimakurivi ipucʉn ia an ka'icʉpʉn.
S.PHON: vavur~ɾu ia noo nimakur~ɾivi ipuʦɨn ia an kaʔiʦɨpɨn.
S.FORM: vavuru ia noo nimakurivi ipucʉn ia an ka'icʉpʉn.
S.PHON: vavur~ɾu ia noo nimakur~ɾivi ipuʦɨn ia an kaʔiʦɨpɨn.
S.TRANSL: 如果山豬的牙齒往外翻,那它不可怕.
If the teeth of the boar grow outward, it will not be terrifying.

S.FORM: noo musutuviki mamia ia niarapapining na ivici nia iihua ia.
S.PHON: noo musutuviki mamia ia niar~ɾapapiniŋ na iviʦi nia iihua ia.
S.FORM: noo musutuviki mamia ia niarapapining na ivici nia iihua ia.
S.PHON: noo musutuviki mamia ia niar~ɾapapiniŋ na iviʦi nia iihua ia.
S.TRANSL: 如果牙齒只有在嘴巴那裏凸出來,那個最可怕
If the teeth of the boar protruded out around its mouth, that will be the most horrible one.
就那樣,我刺那山豬.
Then I stabbed that boar.
我刺那山豬.
I stabbed that boar.
就死了.
Then it died.
我又搬不動.
I could not carry it.
我又回家了.
I went home.
我和人說話,叫他背.
I talked to a person and had him carry the boar.

S.FORM: apu'ʉnaku ngʉnco vavuru ihua vʉnmaku kimpara vantuku ngʉnco nima'un nia.
S.PHON: apuʔɨnaku ŋɨnʦo vavur~ɾu ihua vɨnmaku kimpar~ɾa vantuku ŋɨnʦo nimaʔun nia.
S.FORM: apu'ʉnaku ngʉnco vavuru ihua vʉnmaku kimpara vantuku ngʉnco nima'un nia.
S.PHON: apuʔɨnaku ŋɨnʦo vavur~ɾu ihua vɨnmaku kimpar~ɾa vantuku ŋɨnʦo nimaʔun nia.
S.TRANSL: 山豬拿去賣,然後我把錢給背的人.
I sold the boar, and I gave money to the person who carried it.

S.FORM: makasuacu sinsʉpatʉn pue'iku 'inia mohaku inia cʉmʉ' ʉra ringeemaku.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu sinsɨpatɨn pueʔiku ʔinia mohaku inia ʦɨmɨʔ ɨr~ɾa r~ɾiŋeemaku.
S.FORM: makasuacu sinsʉpatʉn pue'iku 'inia mohaku inia cʉmʉ' ʉra ringeemaku.
S.PHON: makasuaʦu sinsɨpatɨn pueʔiku ʔinia mohaku inia ʦɨmɨʔ ɨr~ɾa r~ɾiŋeemaku.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,過四天我又回去那邊,去看我的套.
After four days, I went back there again to see my traps.
只有一個我做的套.
There was only one trap I made.
我那裏到處看,沒有山豬套.
I saw around, but I didn't see the boar trap.
我砍樹.
I cut the tree.

S.FORM: nimangʉtʉnku karu patacʉkʉcʉkʉʉnku nia ngʉnco pangarʉmaku nakai sua to'onamaku ia nimuriva'ʉku.
S.PHON: nimaŋɨtɨnku kar~ɾu pataʦɨkɨʦɨkɨɨnku nia ŋɨnʦo paŋar~ɾɨmaku nakai sua toʔonamaku ia nimur~ɾivaʔɨku.
S.FORM: nimangʉtʉnku karu patacʉkʉcʉkʉʉnku nia ngʉnco pangarʉmaku nakai sua to'onamaku ia nimuriva'ʉku.
S.PHON: nimaŋɨtɨnku kar~ɾu pataʦɨkɨʦɨkɨɨnku nia ŋɨnʦo paŋar~ɾɨmaku nakai sua toʔonamaku ia nimur~ɾivaʔɨku.
S.TRANSL: 我砍樹,我把矛刺在地下,但是我走錯地方了.
I cut the tree, and tucked the spear into the earth. But I got the wrong way.

S.FORM: cucuru na teku moon na amacara si amurucu ngʉnco vavuru.
S.PHON: ʦuʦur~ɾu na teku moon na amaʦar~ɾa si amur~ɾuʦu ŋɨnʦo vavur~ɾu.
S.FORM: cucuru na teku moon na amacara si amurucu ngʉnco vavuru.
S.PHON: ʦuʦur~ɾu na teku moon na amaʦar~ɾa si amur~ɾuʦu ŋɨnʦo vavur~ɾu.
S.TRANSL: 其實說真的,我本來在上面,因為山豬在下面.
Actually, I was above the boar, because the boar was below.
我去看套.是圓圓的了.
I went to see the trap. It became round.
山豬出現,我刺牠.
The boar showed up. I stabbed it.

S.FORM: koo koo macai rangngʉtʉn tarisi makasua rangngʉtʉn tarisi rangngʉtʉn tarisi.
S.PHON: koo koo maʦai r~ɾaŋŋɨtɨn tar~ɾisi makasua r~ɾaŋŋɨtɨn tar~ɾisi r~ɾaŋŋɨtɨn tar~ɾisi.
S.FORM: koo koo macai rangngʉtʉn tarisi makasua rangngʉtʉn tarisi rangngʉtʉn tarisi.
S.PHON: koo koo maʦai r~ɾaŋŋɨtɨn tar~ɾisi makasua r~ɾaŋŋɨtɨn tar~ɾisi r~ɾaŋŋɨtɨn tar~ɾisi.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣,繩子斷了.
Then, the rope broke.
經過我的腿.
The rope passed by my leg.

S.FORM: nakai mamanʉng akia ngʉnco niaratu'usukee tina'anmaku kapepe vangkavukamaku.
S.PHON: nakai mamanɨŋ akia ŋɨnʦo niar~ɾatuʔusukee tinaʔanmaku kapepe vaŋkavukamaku.
S.FORM: nakai mamanʉng akia ngʉnco niaratu'usukee tina'anmaku kapepe vangkavukamaku.
S.PHON: nakai mamanɨŋ akia ŋɨnʦo niar~ɾatuʔusukee tinaʔanmaku kapepe vaŋkavukamaku.

TRANSL.notes: 還好沒有(受傷).只是碰到我的身體,我的褲子.

S.TRANSL: 還好沒有 .只是碰到我的身體,我的褲子.
Luckily, I was not injured. It just touched my body and my pants.
褲子破了.
The pants was torn.
